page_title: 99% Polyester 1% Carbon Antisatic Fabric - Arox T2 Static Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 160 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 2/1 S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: 99% polyester 1% carbon, antistatic ESD workwear twill fabric.
Arox T2 Static pro fabrics are mostly used for clean room's cloths.
Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5.

High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
160 g/m² , 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 2/1 S Twill Fabric

99% polyester 1% carbon, antistatic ESD workwear twill fabric. Arox T2 Static pro fabrics are mostly used for clean room's cloths. Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5. Technical Parameters Fiber 99% Polyester (PES) 1% Carbon (CF) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 300 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 160 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 900N ; Weft > 700N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Antisatic ESD Cloths Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Antistatic Done EN ISO 1149-5 Chemical Protection Yes ISO 13034 Technical Documents >> Arox T2 Static Pro Data Sheet Certificates EN ISO 1149-5(EN 1149-3) EN ISO 1149-5(EN 1149-3) Test Report
